batches_completed.summary: Scanned src/ (plugin/service/use_case/DB patterns) and captured high-level findings.
Captured existing architecture/control/data model docs and generated brownfield references.

high_level: Python 3.12 + Poetry; Nonebot2 (OneBot V11) bot with plugin/service architecture.
SQLite per-group database via GroupDatabase; schema includes sessions/audit/idempotency/votes and economy tables (points_ledger/sign_in_records/topic_create_requests/topic_votes).
Dynamic command registration via BaseService decorators and service_manager; import side effects exist in nonebot_plugin_manager/__init__.py.
gaps: HTTP internal API endpoints and auth flows need deeper extraction from src/plugins/nonebot_plugin_internal_api (if enabled).
Commands list in api-contracts.md is representative; full list should be derived from SERVICE_CLASSES + decorators if strict completeness is required.

resume_instructions: Delete docs/project-scan-report.json to restart fresh; otherwise resume by re-running document-project.
